title: Version & Backend
description: Current DFlash MLX server version. Updated with each app release.

title: DFlash Draft
description: Enable DFlash speculative decoding. The matching draft model from the [z-lab/dflash](https://huggingface.co/collections/z-lab/dflash) collection is auto-downloaded for the currently running MLX model.

title: DFlash Block Size
description: Block size for DFlash speculative decoding. Default 16; raise for larger drafts at the cost of latency.

title: MTP Speculative Decoding (Gemma 4)
description: Enable Multi-Token Prediction speculative decoding for Gemma 4 targets. The matching `mlx-community/gemma-4-*-it-assistant-bf16` drafter is auto-downloaded for the currently running MLX model. Mutually exclusive with DFlash.

title: MTP Block Size
description: Number of speculatively drafted tokens per round for the Gemma 4 MTP drafter. Default 4 (matches the README perf table); raise for larger drafts at the cost of latency.
